message:
perf(benchmarks): add parallel+SIMD to vector ops benchmark

Add threshold-based parallel SIMD for L2 norm computation:
- VECTOR_SIZE=1024 for cache-friendly batching
- 4-wide SIMD (Vec4) for f64 operations
- MIN_ROWS_PER_THREAD=10000 threshold for parallelization
- Thread count auto-detection

Results: ~8% improvement (2.9M → 3.1M rows/sec) but still slower
than DuckDB (13M rows/sec) due to multi-pass I/O architecture.
DuckDB fuses read+compute; LanceQL does read→parse→extract→compute.

This is expected - LanceQL excels at custom @logic_table operations
(4-8x faster) rather than simple SQL aggregations.
